features.name: part_select_assignment_on_non_standard_range_signal
features.description: Code should include a part-select assignment using slice notation on a signal declared with non-standard index range (e.g., logic [12:11])

features.name: two_bit_signal_with_reversed_index_range
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration using a reversed index range (e.g., [12:11] instead of [1:0]) for a multi-bit signal

features.name: conditional_bit_slice_assignment_with_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a conditional assignment to a bit slice using concatenation with replication operator

features.name: bit_select_from_wider_signal_to_slice
features.description: Code should include an assignment extracting bits from a wider signal to a smaller slice of another signal
